Item Name: Flora Fine Foods Sweet Pistachio Crunchy Spread - Imported from Italy - (7.76 Oz Jar) (Single)

Bullet Point 2: 🟢 Real Pistachio Crunch – Made with true pistachio pieces

Bullet Point 5: 🥄 Smooth & Textured – Creamy base with crunchy bits
Bullet Point 6: 💚 Decadent & Addictive – A luxurious treat for pistachio lovers
Product Description: Flora’s Pistachio Crunchy Spread is a delightful, sweet, and creamy nut butter made from ground pistachios and milk. Similar in texture to peanut and almond butter, you’ll find surprising crunchy pieces of chopped pistachios in every bite. Naturally sweetened and perfectly textured, Flora’s Pistachio Crunchy Spread is perfect for toasts, breads, crackers, pastries, fruits, or any savory dish you wish to try it on. You can dip Flora’s Italian breadsticks in it for a casual sweet offering, or just dip a spoon and eat it by itself. Discover its versatility and combine it with all of Flora’s crunchy spread flavors to embellish your table and delight your family and friends. Pistachio spread is popular for its unique taste and the health benefits of pistachios, which are rich in healthy fats, protein, and antioxidants.
Value: 7.76
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium gourmet pistachio spread imported from Italy, positioned as a luxurious treat with authentic Italian ingredients. High-quality glass jar packaging and emphasis on real pistachio crunch suggest a mid-to-high price point. Ideal for desserts, pastries, and ice cream toppings, targeting food enthusiasts and specialty shoppers.
